level_6_pragmatics.greetings: \b(hello|hi|hey|good morning|morning|good afternoon|afternoon|good evening|evening|howdy|yo|sup|what's up|what is up|how's it going|how is it going|how are you|how're you|nice to see you|good to see you|long time no see|what's good|how have you been|what's crackin'|good to see you again|how are things|nice to meet you|pleased to meet you|g'day|top of the morning to you|what's happening)\b
level_6_pragmatics.farewells: \b(bye|goodbye|see you later|see you soon|take care|have a good one|have a nice day|catch you later|talk to you later|I'm off|I am off|so long|cheers|farewell|until next time|I've got to go|I have got to go|I must be going|see you around|keep in touch|all the best|peace out|I'm out of here|smell you later|adios)\b
level_6_pragmatics.affirmations: \b(yes|yeah|yep|of course|sure|sure thing|absolutely|definitely|I agree|that's right|that is right|sounds good|for sure|no problem|you bet|I couldn't agree more|that's for sure|exactly|without a doubt|I suppose so|that's a good point|I think so too|you got it|right on)\b
level_6_pragmatics.negations: \b(no|nope|nah|not really|I disagree|I don't think so|I do not think so|absolutely not|of course not|no way|not at all|I'm not sure|I am not sure|I can't|I cannot|I'd rather not|I'm not convinced|that's not it|wrong|I doubt it|not likely|over my dead body|you must be joking|not in a million years|I don't agree)\b
level_6_pragmatics.feedback_loops: \b(do you understand|does that make sense|are you with me|got it\?|clear\?)\b
level_6_pragmatics.logic_critique: \b(not make sense|doesn't make sense|confusing|contradictory|wrong logic|incorrect inference|wait what)\b
level_6_pragmatics.phrasing_critique: the way you said (.*?),?\s+didn't make sense

level_7_discourse.transitions: \b(to begin with|first of all|in conclusion|to sum up|overall)\b
level_7_discourse.pragmatic_markers: \b(I think|I believe|I guess|I suppose|just|actually|basically|essentially|sort of|kind of|rather|somewhat|honestly|frankly|clearly|obviously|certainly|definitely|perhaps|maybe|possibly|literally|absolutely|totally|potentially|kindly|if you don't mind|please|would you be so kind|I'm afraid|with all due respect)\b

domain_academic.formal_assertions: \b(the data suggests|the evidence indicates|it is argued that|it is observed that)\b

domain_intents.informative: \b(I am informing you|I'd like to point out|did you know|I wonder|I ask)\b
domain_intents.directive: \b(I command|you must|I require|I suggest|I recommend|you might want to)\b
domain_intents.commissive: \b(I promise|I will ensure|I guarantee|I commit|I refuse|I cannot|I decline)\b
domain_intents.expressive: \b(I apologize|I'm sorry|pardon me|I agree|I concur|I object|I disagree)\b

domain_idiomatic.composite: \b(piece of cake|break a leg|under the weather|once in a blue moon|cost an arm and a leg|hit the nail on the head|bite the bullet|beat around the bush|cut to the chase|call it a day)\b
